user.title: Set up library event matching
user.description: Choose one person and the branches to follow. Optional matching, timing, and calendar-subscription settings are available after setup.

data_description.child_name: Used only in locally rendered digest content.
data_description.birth_date: Used locally to keep age matching current; it is not sent to the library.
data_description.branches: Select one or more supported Free Library branches.

reconfigure.title: Change person and branches
reconfigure.description: These settings define whose age is matched and which official branch feeds are requested.

data_description.child_name: Used only in locally rendered digest content.
data_description.birth_date: Used locally to keep age matching current; it is not sent to the library.
data_description.branches: Select one or more supported Free Library branches.

error.invalid_child_name: Enter a display name of 80 characters or fewer.
error.birth_date_in_future: The birth date cannot be in the future.
error.branch_required: Select at least one library branch.
error.invalid_calendar_duration: Calendar duration must be between 15 and 240 minutes.
error.invalid_scan_interval: Refresh interval must be between 900 and 86400 seconds.
error.invalid_config: Check the settings and try again.

abort.already_configured: Free Library Events is already configured. Use Configure to change its settings.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The person and branch settings were updated.

init.title: Configure weekly library events
init.description: Choose the optional behavior to change. Calendar subscription: {webcal_status}

behavior.title: Matching and timing
behavior.description: Matching changes apply after saving. Enable Show advanced options to change placeholder duration or source polling.

data_description.filter_mode: Recommended balances age fit with family-friendly options. Strict includes only explicit best matches; Broad includes more general children's events.
data_description.calendar_duration_minutes: Used only when the library does not publish an end time.
data_description.scan_interval_seconds: Six hours (21600 seconds) is recommended. The render action refreshes again by default immediately before generating the digest.

webcal.title: Calendar subscription
webcal.description: Enable a token-protected feed for calendar apps that cannot sign in to Home Assistant. Treat either subscription URL as a password. Current status: {webcal_status}

data.publish_webcal: Publish a private calendar subscription feed

data_description.publish_webcal: Disabling publishing immediately invalidates and removes the current private URL after reload.
data_description.webcal_name: Displayed as the calendar name by subscription clients.

regenerate_webcal.title: Regenerate calendar subscription URL
regenerate_webcal.description: Submitting this form creates a new private URL. Existing calendar subscriptions will stop updating until they are changed to the new URL.

webcal_url.title: Calendar subscription URL
webcal_url.description:
{url_scope}. Copy either URL, then select Submit to activate it. Treat both as passwords.

Canonical HTTP(S) URL:
`{http_url}`

WebCal convenience URL:
`{webcal_url}`

error.invalid_calendar_duration: Calendar duration must be between 15 and 240 minutes.
error.invalid_scan_interval: Refresh interval must be between 900 and 86400 seconds.
error.invalid_webcal_name: Enter a calendar name of 80 characters or fewer.
error.invalid_config: Check the settings and try again.
